section.title: Reputation on other platforms
section.subtitle: Reviews from verified travellers on the main accommodation sites

snippets.googleOnly: Only Google displays full review text because it provides an official API. Other platforms show the aggregate score and a direct link for legal reasons.
snippets.ttlExpired: Text reviews are temporarily unavailable; showing score only

ownerConfig.title: External reputation settings
ownerConfig.rateLimitHit: You can refresh again in {{minutes}} minutes
ownerConfig.googleOnlyExplainer: Review text is only available for Google. Other platforms display the score and a link.
ownerConfig.verifiedHint: The link has been verified and corresponds to this accommodation

errors.fetchFailed: Could not load external reviews. Please try again later.
errors.notFound: No reputation data found for this platform.
errors.blocked: Access to this platform's data has been temporarily blocked.
